prestazioni: G16E-GTS 1.6L turbocharged inline-3 engine: Full Akrapovič 3.5-inch titanium exhaust system with 4-2-1 equal-length headers and 100-cell catalytic converter for optimized backpressure and 20-25 HP gain at 7,000 RPM

Garrett GT2867R turbocharger upgrade with billet compressor wheel (60mm inducer, 76mm exducer), 0.82 A/R turbine housing, and TiAL MV-R 44mm external wastegate for 380-400 HP potential on E85 with 32 PSI boost
Ohlins TTX40 2-way adjustable dampers with 30-way rebound and 22-way compression settings, paired with custom 800 lb/in front and 600 lb/in rear springs for FIA R5-spec gravel rally compliance
estetica: Rally Art carbon fiber front splitter with integrated 3D-printed air curtains for 15% reduction in front axle lift at 120 mph (193 km/h)
GR-Four-specific WRC-style rear diffuser by TTE (Toyota Team Europe) with 5 vertical strakes and 20mm Gurney flap for 40 kg downforce at 100 mph (160 km/h)
Recaro SPG XL-Rally seats with FIA 8862-2009 homologation, Schroth 6-point harnesses, and custom GR Yaris-specific mounting brackets for 15mm lower seating position
